creator: kuriyama@imgsrc.co.jp
text:
Hi maintainer, update request of your port comes...

At 11 Mar 2001 08:50:20 GMT,
martti.kuparinen@iki.fi wrote:
> 
> 
> >Number:         25690
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       [PATCH] x11-wm/fvwm2-beta update
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       low
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >State:          open
> >Quarter:        
> >Keywords:       
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          change-request
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >Arrival-Date:   Sun Mar 11 00:50:01 PST 2001
> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Martti Kuparinen
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.2-RELEASE i386
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> 
> 	
> 
> >Description:
> 
> Here's an update for the fvwm2-beta package.
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> 	
> 
> >Fix:
> 
> diff -ru /usr/ports/x11-wm/fvwm2-beta/Makefile fvwm2-beta/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/x11-wm/fvwm2-beta/Makefile	Thu Feb 15 17:55:56 2001
> +++ fvwm2-beta/Makefile	Sun Mar 11 10:37:14 2001
> @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	fvwm
> -PORTVERSION=	2.3.28
> +PORTVERSION=	2.3.29
>  CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
>  MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.fvwm.org/pub/fvwm/version-2/ \
>  		http://www.fvwm.org/generated/icon_download/
> diff -ru /usr/ports/x11-wm/fvwm2-beta/distinfo fvwm2-beta/distinfo
> --- /usr/ports/x11-wm/fvwm2-beta/distinfo	Thu Feb 15 17:55:56 2001
> +++ fvwm2-beta/distinfo	Sun Mar 11 10:37:19 2001
> @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
> -MD5 (fvwm-2.3.28.tar.gz) = 3fd0a220efa699049ed02a02befc2a39
> +MD5 (fvwm-2.3.29.tar.gz) = 295dd0e0c50c185dcb67f1b86c18baf8
>  MD5 (fvwm_icons.tgz) = 7b254da269a236d77c790581701442cb
